properties.description: The version number of the application.

properties.description: Has it been modified since the last save?
properties.name: modified

properties.description: Its location on disk, if it has one.
properties.name: file

properties.description: The unique identifier of the window.
properties.name: id

properties.description: The index of the window, ordered front to back.
properties.name: index

properties.name: bounds

properties.description: Does the window have a close button?
properties.name: closeable

properties.description: Does the window have a minimize button?
properties.name: miniaturizable

properties.description: Is the window minimized right now?
properties.name: miniaturized

properties.description: Is the window visible right now?
properties.name: visible

properties.description: Does the window have a zoom button?
properties.name: zoomable

properties.description: Is the window zoomed right now?
properties.name: zoomed

properties.description: The document whose contents are displayed in the window.
properties.name: document

direct_parameter.description: the document(s) or window(s) to close.

parameters.description: Should changes be saved before closing?
parameters.name: saving

parameters.description: The file in which to save the document, if so.

parameters.description: The file in which to save the document.
parameters.name: in

direct_parameter.description: The file(s), document(s), or window(s) to be printed.

parameters.description: Should the application show the print dialog?
parameters.name: print dialog

parameters.description: Should changes be saved before quitting?
parameters.name: saving

commands.description: Return the number of elements of a particular class within an object.
commands.name: count

parameters.description: The class of objects to be counted.
parameters.name: each

parameters.description: The location for the new copy or copies.
parameters.name: to

parameters.description: Properties to set in the new copy or copies right away.
parameters.name: with properties

parameters.description: The class of the new object.
parameters.name: new

parameters.description: The location at which to insert the object.
parameters.name: at

parameters.description: The initial contents of the object.
parameters.name: with data

parameters.description: The initial values for properties of the object.
parameters.name: with properties

commands.description: Move an object to a new location.
commands.name: move

parameters.description: The new location for the object(s).
parameters.name: to

values.description: Ask the user whether or not to save the file.
values.name: ask

values.name: detailed
